pages.currentRankBasis: displayed humanoidAlphaCompanies rerank from the page data; KOID holdings influence included when a row is a KOID holding or KOID-validated component name
SignalsClient default current-alpha sort using AI sensitivity, confidence, bottleneck category, cap room, YTD rerating room, risk, and Hormuz sensitivity

methodology: One-stock-at-a-time alpha relevance audit as of 2026-06-08. Existing page ranks were preserved as currentRankIfKnown, then each ticker was reassessed for hidden/under-owned upside after adjusting for market cap, YTD rerating, valuation/crowding, direct physical-AI or AI-infrastructure commercialization evidence, sensors/actuators/motion/perception exposure, KOID ownership where applicable, AI 2027 physical-AI spillover, and current primary/company sources where feasible. RankMove means suggested movement inside the page alpha ranking, not an investment recommendation or price target.
